title: callistachys microphylla
intro: Callistachys microphylla, also known as the dwarf keel, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Callistachys microphylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
